violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
Inspector observed queso fresco and crema fresca without proper labels from manufacture. PIC disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

Raw animal foods (such as raw chicken and beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce) in the deli display refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated raw meats. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

Various empanadas was observed held between 99-111 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated and turned up unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

Various TCS items were observed held between 44-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed of items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
Inspector observed a large dead American cockroach in basement area. PIC disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2026
